potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall enable users to contact professional nutritionists for further clarification.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Health plays a major role in everyone’s life.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall recognize the importance of health in users' lives.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: People consume unhealthy food and ruin their diet.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall identify unhealthy dietary habits and provide suggestions for improvement.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Some medication results in side effects.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall consider potential side effects of medications when providing recommendations.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: Users can ping professional nutritionists for more clarification.
hallucinations.reason: There is no mention of users being able to contact professionals in the source text. This requirement appears to be an assumption or a feature not mentioned.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall provide recommendations of nutrients to users.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is somewhat ambiguous as it does not specify how the recommendations are generated or what kind of nutrients are being recommended.
